session_1.speaker: Alice
session_1.text: I finally adopted a dog this weekend, a husky named Koda.

session_1.speaker: Bob
session_1.text: That's great! Are you training him yourself?

session_1.text: Yes, and I also started a new job at a fintech called Ledgerly.

session_2.text: Great. Ledgerly has me working in Rust, which I'm enjoying.
